caption: A man dressed in a loose-fitting, blue traditional martial arts outfit performs a routine with a long, slender staff in a large indoor ballroom. He stands on a wide, blue-carpeted stage in front of an audience seated at banquet tables with white tablecloths. The room features neutral-toned walls, recessed ceiling lighting, and several beige pillars. In the initial sequence, the man is seen from behind, swinging the staff in a wide arc to his left while stepping forward. As the sequence progresses, he rotates his body, bringing the staff across his front and extending it toward his right. Throughout the movement, the audience remains seated, watching the performance. A second person in a blue outfit is visible in the background, standing near the edge of the stage. No on-screen text or logos are visible.
